message.content:
Explore the codebase to gather all information needed to build a Translator screen (SCRN013). I need:

1. Look at an existing full-view screen (e.g. src/components/snippet_manager/ or src/components/floating_notes/) to understand the pattern: imports, self-contained UI (SearchBar, List, ActionPanel, Alert, HUD), how they register in the command registry, SCSS patterns.

2. Find how commands are registered in src/registry/ and src/extensions/ 

3. Check src/data/ for how mock data files are structured

4. Check _tokens.scss for available design tokens

5. Check types.ts for existing types

6. Look at how other screens handle the SearchBar, ActionPanel, and HUD integration

Return full code examples from at least one complete screen component, the registry/extension registration, and the data file so I can follow the exact same patterns.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase systematically to gather all the information you need for building the Translator screen. Let me start by understanding the project structure and examining existing screens.

1→import { FloatingNotesView } from '../../components/floating_notes/floating_notes_view';
     2→import { NotesIcon } from '../../components/icons';
     3→import type { ExtensionManifest } from '../../registry/types';
     4→
     5→export const floatingNotesExtension: ExtensionManifest = {
     6→  id: 'floating-notes',
     7→  name: 'Floating Notes',
     8→  icon: NotesIcon(),
     9→  description:
    10→    'Create and manage quick notes. Markdown-enabled editor with auto-save.',
    11→  author: 'Raycast',
    12→  commands: [
    13→    {
    14→      name: 'floating-notes',
    15→      title: 'Floating Notes',
    16→      subtitle: 'Floating Notes',
    17→      icon: NotesIcon(),
    18→      keywords: [
    19→        'note',
    20→        'notes',
    21→        'floating',
    22→        'write',
    23→        'markdown',
    24→        'text',
    25→        'memo',

    32→      detail: {
    33→        markdown: `# Floating Notes
    34→
    35→Create and manage quick notes with a markdown-enabled editor.
    36→
    37→## Features
    38→- Auto-save with 500ms debounce
    39→- Markdown content support
    40→- Full-text search across notes
    41→- Recent and older sections`,
    42→        metadata: [
    43→          {
    44→            type: 'label',
    45→            title: 'Application',

1→import type { TagColor } from '../constants/tag_colors'; 2→ 3→export interface SnippetEntry { 4→ id: string; 5→ name: string; 6→ keyword: string; 7→ content: string; 8→ category: 'general' | 'code' | 'email' | 'template'; 9→ tags: { 10→ text: string; 11→ color?: TagColor; 12→ }[]; 13→ createdAt: Date; 14→} 15→ 16→export type SnippetCategory = SnippetEntry['category']; 17→ 18→const SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES: SnippetCategory[] = [ 19→ 'general', 20→ 'code', 21→ 'email', 22→ 'template', 23→]; 24→ 25→export function isSnippetCategory(v: string): v is SnippetCategory { 26→ return (SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES as string[]).includes(v); 27→} 28→ 29→const now = Date.now(); 30→ 31→export const SNIPPET_CATEGORIES = [ 32→ { 33→ label: 'General', 34→ value: 'general', 35→ }, 36→ { 37→ label: 'Code', 38→ value: 'code', 39→ }, 40→ { 41→ label: 'Email', 42→ value: 'email', 43→ }, 44→ { 45→ label: 'Template', 46→ value: 'template', 47→ }, 48→] as const;   (left/top) and translated text (right/bottom). Language selector dropdowns

  (reverse text or placeholder). In production, integrate with translation
  API. Support 20+ languages. Create src/components/translator/
  translator_view.tsx and translator.scss. Push from "Translate" command.

- [ ] [P2] SCRN014 - Build Reminders screen. List of reminders with
  title, due date/time, and repeat options. Create reminder form: title,
  date (FormDatePicker), time, repeat (none/daily/weekly/monthly), notes.
  Sections: Overdue, Today, Upcoming, Completed. Toggle complete with
  checkbox. Delete with confirm. In Tauri mode, use OS notification API
  for due reminders. Persist via localStorage/SQLite. Push from "Reminders"
  command. Create src/components/reminders/reminders_view.tsx and
  src/data/reminders_data.ts.

- [ ] [P3] SCRN015 - Build Script Commands screen. List view of user-defined
